name: Toll House Crumb Cake from Brigitte Sealing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In another large bowl, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs one at a time to the butter mixture, beating well after each addition.
4. Alternate adding the flour mixture and sour cream to the butter mixture, mixing gently until just combined.
5. Fold in the chocolate chips.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9 inch pan.
7. In a small bowl, mix together the topping ingredients (flour, brown sugar, soft butter, chopped nuts, and additional chocolate chips) until crumbly.
8. Sprinkle the topping evenly over the batter.
9. Bake at 350 degrees F for 45-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
10. Allow the cake to cool completely before cutting into 24 squares, each measuring approximately two inches by two inches.
